steps.title: Identify the comparative signal
steps.content: The underlined sentence presents a key observation: dream eye movements match the pattern of awake eye movements. This matching is evidence that supports a conclusion.

steps.title: Apply the signal to determine function
steps.content:
Choice D identifies this function exactly: the matching behavior is the comparable circumstance that helps justify the team's conclusion.

The other choices either reverse the logical relationship (A), add unsupported claims (B), or mistake the finding for an implication (C).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
